productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Polo T-shirts
description: CompositionWhite polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a plaid fabric collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with rolled cuffs made of plaid fabric with buttoned flaps, buttoned chest placket, welt pocket with a buttoned closure on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLook cool and sophisticated in this white polo neck T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The welt pocket on the left chest adds an interesting detail to the tee, while the cotton keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
